questionHtml:
Which process occurs during the light-dependent reaction of photosynthesis?

A. ATP, CO2 and H2O are produced.

B. CO2 is used to produce carbohydrates.

C. ATP and O2 are produced.

D. RuBP is phosphorylated.

meta.title: Which process occurs during the light-dependent reaction of photosynthesis? A. ATP, CO2 and H2O are produced. B. CO2 is used to produce carbohydrates. C. ATP and O2 are produced. D
